welcome_message: 🌍 Your Gateway to the World: TopKap! 🇹🇷 Welcome to TopKap! Turkey's Wholesale Textile Hub. List your products and reach buyers from 180+ countries. 🌐 Please select your language:
main_menu_supplier: Select an action from the menu below:
connect_account_prompt: To link your TopKap account, please click the link provided to you.
connect_success: ✅ Your account has been linked successfully! You can now add your products and publish them to your Telegram channel with ease. 🚀
connect_error: ❌ Account linking failed. Please try again from the TopKap app or contact our support team.
channel_add_admin: 📢 Connect Your Telegram Channel Add the bot to your channel as an Administrator. Once added, the channel will be connected automatically. ✅
channel_connected: 🎉 Channel connected successfully! 📢 Channel: {channel_name} You can now publish your products directly to this channel. Use the menu below to add a product now. 🚀
channel_error: ❌ Channel connection failed. Please make sure your account is linked to the TopKap app and try again.
error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
add_product_categories_error: ❌ Failed to load categories. Please check your connection and try again.
add_product_select_category: 📂 Step 1 — Main Category Select the main category for your product:
add_product_select_subcategory: 📁 Step 2 — Subcategory Select the subcategory for your product:
add_product_fill_form: ✍️ Step 3 — Product Details Describe your product in a single message including: • Product name • Description • Price ($ USD) (example: 200) • Attributes (color, size, etc.) AI will automatically extract and organize the data.
add_product_ai_processing: 🤖 AI is analyzing your data... Processing your input, please wait.
add_product_upload_images: 📸 Step 4 — Product Photos Send your product photos now. From 1 to {max} photos allowed.
add_product_upload_more: 📸 Keep sending photos. When done, press Publish.
add_product_confirm: ✅ {count} photo(s) uploaded. Confirm to publish or add more photos.
add_product_publishing: 🚀 Publishing your product... Uploading photos and creating the product. Please wait.
add_product_success: 🎉 Your product has been published successfully! Your product is now live on TopKap and TopGate.
add_product_channel_published: 📢 Also published to your channel! Your customers can now see the product and contact you directly.
add_product_no_channel: 💡 You haven't connected a channel yet. Use the Channel Management menu to connect one.
add_product_api_error: ❌ An error occurred while adding the product. Please try again later or contact our support team.
add_product_cancelled: ❌ Operation cancelled. Press any button to return to the main menu.
color_upload_ask: 🎨 Color {current}/{total}: {color_name} ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📸 Send photos for this color. 1 to 5 photos per color.
color_upload_max: ⚠️ Maximum 5 photos allowed for {color_name}. Contact support if you need more.
color_upload_skip_notice: ⏭️ {color_name} skipped. 📱 You can upload photos later anytime from the TopKap app.
color_upload_no_photo_warning: ⚠️ No photos uploaded for {color_name} yet. 📊 Photos help buyers filter by color and increase your sales. Upload at least 1 photo or skip this color.
color_upload_multicolor_ask: 🌈 Multi-Color product — send all product photos ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 📸 1 to 5 photos.
